schema.name: Single Cell Schema
schema.standard: Darwin Core extension for single-cell RNA-seq

study.Title: A single cell RNAseq benchmark experiment embedding 'controlled' cancer heterogeneity
study.Description: This dataset provides single-cell transcriptomic profiles of seven lung cancer cell lines characterized by the expression of seven different driver genes (EGFR, ALK, MET, ERBB2, KRAS, BRAF, ROS1), leading to partially overlapping functional pathways. Additionally, PBMC from a healthy donor were also sequenced. The BE1 dataset serves as a controlled heterogeneous environment for the development and validation of methodologies for analysing cancer heterogeneity by means of scRNA-seq. BE1 includes scRNAseq for lung cancer cell lines with known driver mutations: PC9 (EGFR Del19, 4492 cells), A549 (KRAS p.G12S, 6898 cells), NCI-H596 (HTB178, MET Del14, 2965 cells), NCI-H1395 (CRL5868, BRAF p.G469A, 2673 cells), DV90 (ERBB2 p.V842I, 2998 cells), HCC78 (SLC34A2-ROS1 Fusion, 2748 cells), CCL.185.IG (EML4-ALK Fusion in A549 isogenic background, 6354 cells), and PBMCs from healthy donor. Total of 29,528 cells sequenced. Public release date: December 2, 2023.
study.Bibliographic Citation: Arigoni M, Ratto ML, Riccardo F, Balmas E et al. A single cell RNAseq benchmark experiment embedding 'controlled' cancer heterogeneity. Sci Data 2024 Feb 2;11(1):159. PMID: 38307867; doi: 10.1038/s41597-024-03002-8
study.Workflow (optional): 10X Genomics Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' Kit v3.1 with Cell Multiplexing (CellPlex)

person.Affiliation or Institution: University of Torino, Molecular Biotechnology Center, Bioinformatics and Genomics Unit, Via Nizza 52, Torino, 10126, Italy
person.Funder (optional): ELIXIR; CN00000013 'National Centre for HPC, Big Data and Quantum Computing'
person.Grant Award (optional): ELIXIR Single Cell Omics Community Implementation Study (SCONE)
ELIXIR Single Cell Omics Community Implementation Study (SCONE)

sample.Biosample Accession: Cell line: PC9 (Creative Bioarray CSC-C4619); EGFR Del19 activating mutation; PMID: 21167064
Cell line: A549 (ATCC-CCL-185); KRAS p.G12S mutation; PMID: 20358631
Cell line: NCI-H596 (ATCC-HTB-178); MET Del14 mutation; PMID: 35636967
Cell line: NCI-H1395 (ATCC-CRL-5868); BRAF p.G469A gain of function mutation; PMID: 32540409
Cell line: DV90 (DSMZ ACC 307); ERBB2 p.V842I mutation increasing kinase activity; PMID: 23220880
Cell line: HCC78 (DSMZ ACC 563); SLC34A2-ROS1 Fusion; PMID: 22919003
Cell line: CCL-185-IG (ATCC-CCL-185-IG); EML4-ALK Fusion (EML4 exon13; ALK exon20) in A549 isogenic background; https://www.atcc.org/products/ccl-185ig
White blood cells from donor buffy coat (PBMC); healthy donor

dissociation.Protocol Name: 10X Genomics Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' v3.1 with CellPlex Multiplexing
dissociation.Dissociation Description: Cell lines were cultured as per manufacturer recommendations. PC9, A549, NCI-H596, NCI-H1395, DV90, HCC78, CCL.185-IG, and PBMCs from healthy donor were processed. Cells were washed, incubated with Cell Multiplexing Oligos, and assessed for viability (>80%) before loading on Chromium Next GEM chip G.
dissociation.Enrichment Markers (optional): None for cell lines; PBMCs processed without enrichment
dissociation.Isolation Kit (optional): 10X Genomics Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' Kit v3.1

lib_prep.Cell Suspension ID: CELLSUSP_PC9, CELLSUSP_A549, CELLSUSP_NCI-H596, CELLSUSP_NCI-H1395, CELLSUSP_DV90, CELLSUSP_HCC78, CELLSUSP_CCL185-IG, CELLSUSP_PBMC
lib_prep.Library Preparation Kit: 10X Genomics Chromium Next GEM Single Cell 3' Kit v3.1
lib_prep.Cell Phenotype (optional): Lung cancer cell lines with driver mutations plus healthy PBMCs

analysis_derived_data.Inferred Cell Type (optional): Cell line identity based on driver mutation
analysis_derived_data.Other Derived Cell Attributes (optional): Driver mutation status, cell line origin, total UMIs, genes detected, mitochondrial percentage

raw_data_processing.Annotation Filtering (optional): Standard 10X Genomics filtering with intron-mode included
raw_data_processing.Read Mapping Statistics (optional): Available in GEO submission; average mapping rate >90%
raw_data_processing.Sequencing Saturation (optional): Available in GEO submission; ranges from 38.7% to 60.6% per cell line
raw_data_processing.Other Quality Filters Applied (optional): Cells with mitochondrial read percentage >20% excluded; cells with <500 UMI counts excluded; cells with <200 detected genes excluded
raw_data_processing.Individual Organism SNP Demultiplexing (: Not applicable (all samples human cell lines)

downstream_processing.Integration/Batch Correction (optional): Not applied for validation; pseudo-bulks compared with CCLE bulk transcriptomes

data_availability_checklist.Source Code (optional): Cell Ranger v7.1.0 Docker container available at docker.io/repbioinfo/cellranger.2023.7.1.0; R Shiny App for generating controlled mixtures available at http://aisc.hpc4ai.unito.it:3838/; Scripts available in repository
data_availability_checklist.UMI Count Matrix (optional): Available at GEO: GSE243665 and figshare: 10.6084/m9.figshare.23939481.v1 (10X Genomics sparse matrix format)
data_availability_checklist.Ensembl IDs (optional): Ensembl v99/GRCh38 gene IDs included in count matrices
data_availability_checklist.Functional Gene Annotations (optional): Supporting data at figshare: 10.6084/m9.figshare.23284748.v1 - includes CCLE database info and driver gene targets relationships
data_availability_checklist.Cell Metadata (optional): Available at GEO and figshare; includes per cell line QC metrics, metrics_summary.csv, web_summary.html
data_availability_checklist.Cluster-Level Normalised Expression Tabl: Validation data available in manuscript; pseudo-bulks generated for BE1-500 dataset
data_availability_checklist.Other Resource Files (optional): FASTQ data available at SRA: SRP462078; Code and documentation at figshare: 10.6084/m9.figshare.24744996.v1

file.White List Barcode File (optional): Included in Cell Ranger v7.1.0 distribution

expression_data_process_setting.Normalisation Method (optional): To be applied by users; validation used log2CPM for pseudo-bulks
expression_data_process_setting.Highly Variable Gene Selection (HVG) (op: Validation used COMET software to identify top 100 gene markers per cluster
expression_data_process_setting.Dimensionality Reduction (optional): To be applied by users; validation used hierarchical clustering
expression_data_process_setting.Clustering Algorithm (optional): To be defined by users; validation used Seurat/Louvain
expression_data_process_setting.Clustering Resolution (optional): To be defined by users; validation used 0.1
expression_data_process_setting.Clustering Distance Metric (optional): To be defined by users; validation used Euclidean
expression_data_process_setting.Software Versions (optional): Cell Ranger v7.1.0; rCASC; Seurat; COMET
expression_data_process_setting.Cell Type Annotation (optional): Cell line identity confirmed by comparison with CCLE bulk transcriptomes
expression_data_process_setting.Notes (optional): Benchmarking dataset designed for evaluating computational tools for cancer heterogeneity analysis; intronic reads included in quantification

repository_metadata.name: sco-benchmark-experiments
repository_metadata.description: FAIR metadata and query tools for the ELIXIR Single Cell Omics BE1 benchmark dataset.
